ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the sample */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay performed (e.g., RNA-Seq) */,
  "avg_spot_len" INTEGER /* Average length of spots in the sequencing run */,
  "bases" TEXT /* Total bases sequenced */,
  "biomaterial_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the biomaterial */,
  "bio_project" TEXT /* Associated bio project identifier */,
  "bio_sample" TEXT /* Bio sample identifier */,
  "bio_sample_model" TEXT /* Model of the bio sample */,
  "bytes" TEXT /* Size of the data in bytes */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line used in the experiment */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center conducting the experiment */,
  "consent" TEXT /* Consent status of the sample */,
  "datastore_filetype" TEXT /* File types stored in the datastore */,
  "datastore_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the datastore */,
  "datastore_region" TEXT /* Region of the datastore */,
  "dev_stage" TEXT /* Development stage of the sample */,
  "experiment" TEXT /* Experiment ID */,
  "health_state" TEXT /* Health state of the sample */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for sequencing */,
  "isolate" TEXT /* Isolate identifier */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Library name used in sequencing */,
  "library_layout" TEXT /* Library layout (e.g., PAIRED) */,
  "library_selection" TEXT /* Library selection method */,
  "library_source" TEXT /* Source of the library */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample is derived */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release for the sequencing data */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the sample donor */,
  "sra_study" TEXT /* Study identifier in SRA */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue type of the sample */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "sequencing_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of sequencing to indicate coverage */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality metrics of the sequencing data (e.g., Q30 score) */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of any associated publications (e.g., published, in-review) */,
  "data_accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level (e.g., public, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_bio_sample FOREIGN KEY ("bio_sample") REFERENCES bio_samples ("bio_sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_center_name FOREIGN KEY ("center_name") REFERENCES inst_centers ("center_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "bio_samples" (
  "bio_sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bio sample */,
  "bio_project" TEXT /* Associated bio project identifier */,
  "bio_sample_model" TEXT /* Model of the biological sample */,
  "health_state" TEXT /* Health state of the sample */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue type from which the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored (e.g., -80°C) */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., hospital, lab) */,
  "donor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inst_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director of the center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sequencing run
Average length of spots in the sequencing run
Size of the data in bytes
Cell line used in the experiment
Name of the center conducting the experiment
File types stored in the datastore
Organism from which the sample is derived
Date of release for the sequencing data
Date when the experiment was conducted
Depth of sequencing to indicate coverage
Quality metrics of the sequencing data (e.g., Q30 score)
ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment
Status of any associated publications (e.g., published, in-review)
Unique identifier for each bio sample
Tissue type from which the sample was collected
Date when the sample was collected
Conditions under which the sample is stored (e.g., -80°C)
Source of the sample (e.g., hospital, lab)
Name of the director of the center
